key_risks: Hot May CPI/PPI prints (June 10-11) trigger hawkish FOMC repricing and tech multiple compression
AI/semi momentum reverses on positioning unwind after sharp 30d gains
Oil at $93+ and PPI spike feed through to renewed inflation scare hitting both equities and gold simultaneously
Geopolitical de-escalation pressures gold and defense names

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex surge, Q1 semi sales +25% QoQ
Tech leadership, AI spending forecast +47% YoY in 2026
Strong momentum, AI cyber spend nearly doubling
Hedge against sticky inflation (CPI 3.8%, PPI +1.4% MoM) and geopolitical risk
FY27 $1.5T defense budget tailwind, low beta to tech

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/tech leadership where earnings momentum and capex are strongest, balanced with gold and defense for inflation/geopolitical hedge into FOMC meeting.
rationale_summary: Overweight AI-linked tech (semis, software-adjacent, cyber) given dominant momentum and capex acceleration; gold and defense provide ballast against sticky inflation prints and June FOMC risk.
